title: Carpotroche linguifolia
taxonomy: Carpotroche linguifolia is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Carpotroche linguifolia belongs to the genus Carpotroche, which is a group of plants that are commonly found in the rainforests of these regions. The plant's classification is further refined by its kingdom (Plantae) and phylum (Angiosperms) classifications. As a member of the family Euphorbiaceae, Carpotroche linguifolia shares characteristics with other plants that have similar growth habits and reproductive strategies.
